tasks.description: Fix ClawRouter port 8402→18789 and enable USE_CLAWROUTER in .env
tasks.context:
TWO changes in TWO files:

FILE 1: backend/src/lib/clawrouter-client.ts
Line 17 currently reads:
  const CLAWROUTER_URL = process.env.CLAWROUTER_GATEWAY_URL || 'http://localhost:8402/v1';
Change ONLY this line to:
  const CLAWROUTER_URL = process.env.CLAWROUTER_GATEWAY_URL || 'http://localhost:18789/v1';
Do NOT change anything else in this file.

FILE 2: .env (in the project root ~/Documents/Invoica/.env)
Add these two lines at the end of the file:
  USE_CLAWROUTER=true
  CLAWROUTER_GATEWAY_URL=http://localhost:18789/v1
Do NOT remove or modify any existing lines. Read the file first to see what is already there.

tasks.description: Wire Ollama + ClawRouter into orchestrate-agents-v2.ts — replace MiniMax model routing
tasks.status_note: DONE 2026-03-12 — 5 targeted changes, 0 TS errors on V17 files

tasks.description: Retire MiniMax — replace callMiniMax() calls in orchestrator with callClawRouter/callOllama
tasks.status_note: DONE 2026-03-12 — 5 occurrences replaced (2 CEO + 3 CTO), 0 TS errors
tasks.context:
FILE: scripts/orchestrate-agents-v2.ts (EDIT existing)

MiniMax is being retired. Replace all MiniMax API calls with ClawRouter equivalents.

Find all occurrences of: callLLM('minimax', 'MiniMax-M2.5', ...)
There are 5 occurrences (CEOAgent.assessProgress ~line 428, CEOAgent.generateDailyReport ~line 595, CTOAgent.analyze ~line 764, CTOAgent.runPostSprintAnalysis ~line 875, and task decomposition ~line 1708).

For EACH occurrence, replace:
  const response = await callLLM('minimax', 'MiniMax-M2.5', this.systemPrompt, userPrompt, TIMEOUT);
With:
  const crResult = await callClawRouter({ model: 'deepseek/deepseek-chat', prompt: userPrompt, systemPrompt: this.systemPrompt, maxTokens: 4096 });
  const response = { choices: [{ message: { content: crResult.content } }], usage: { total_tokens: crResult.inputTokens + crResult.outputTokens } };

After replacing all 5 occurrences, also remove the MiniMax think-tag strip line that follows each response:
  content = content.replace(/<think>[\s\S]*?<\/think>/g, '').trim();
Keep this line only for the CTOAgent calls (deepseek-r1 may still emit think tags — ClawRouter passes them through). Remove it for CEOAgent daily report and progress assessment (Claude Haiku via ClawRouter doesn't emit think tags).

Do NOT remove the callLLM function itself — it is still used for callLLM('anthropic', ...) calls.
Do NOT change any import statements — callClawRouter is already imported (added in V17-S1-004).
Do NOT change the CodingAgent.execute() callLLM call — that was already refactored in V17-S1-004.
